CVE-2023-26112.title: All versions of the package configobj are vulnerable to Regular E ...
CVE-2023-26112.description: All versions of the package configobj are vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via the validate function, using (.+?)\((.*)\).**Note:** This is only exploitable in the case of a developer, putting the offending value in a server side configuration file.
